notes: Two-leg XTI/XAG oil-silver ratio breakout basket from MACROTRENDS-SILVER-OIL-RATIO-2026. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute ln(XTIUSD) - beta * ln(XAGUSD). Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
Distinct from QM5_12606_oil-silver-ratio: this follows ratio breakouts and exits on signal failure or time stop instead of fading z-score extremes.
